e7665733-fca8-419f-8d9d-fe67ab129409.pauseMessage: Place PCR tubes with gDNA and sample mixtures onto the 42C heat block for 2 minutes and then place on ice. In the meantime, start the next portion of the protocol.

f1b58b5e-22f6-497a-bfc2-46f66a2fbb53.pauseMessage: Remove PCR tubes from ice and place into individual PCR plate holder.

63e6e327-fbe4-46ac-94ea-cc7bab914b76.pauseMessage: Place PCR tubes with RTase and sample mixture on the 42C heatblock for 15 minutes and then place on the 95C heatblock for 3 minutes, and then place on ice. Remove gDNA wipeout (A1), RTase (A3), Premix RT (A4) and place into freezer. Once ready, load primers into machine.

params.message: Place PCR tubes with gDNA and sample mixtures onto the 42C heat block for 2 minutes and then place on ice. In the meantime, start the next portion of the protocol.
Remove PCR tubes from ice and place into individual PCR plate holder.

Place PCR tubes with RTase and sample mixture on the 42C heatblock for 15 minutes and then place on the 95C heatblock for 3 minutes, and then place on ice. Remove gDNA wipeout (A1), RTase (A3), Premix RT (A4) and place into freezer. Once ready, load primers into machine.
